name: Neko
description: A self-hosted virtual browser that uses WebRTC to stream a desktop environment to multiple users for watch parties, collaborative browsing, and interactive presentations.

notes.text: Login is password-only: 'admin' for admin, 'neko' for regular user. Change both in /etc/neko/neko.yaml.
Firefox ESR is installed as the default browser. The virtual display runs at 1280x720.
